description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape, featuring a traditional black and white pattern composed of pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface appears slightly matte with subtle shading, suggesting a synthetic leather or polyurethane outer layer. The black pentagons and white hexagons are evenly distributed, giving it a recognizable and iconic look. There are no visible logos, text, or branding on the panels, and the seams between the panels are faint, indicating a smooth finish. The ball shows no significant scuffs, dirt, or deformation, suggesting it is either new or only lightly used. Its size and design are typical for use in parks, playgrounds, or urban sports fields.
description: A classic black and white football with a traditional panel pattern and a smooth, matte surface, showing minimal wear.
description_view_0: This view highlights three black pentagonal panels and several white hexagonal panels, with smooth seams and no visible branding.
description_view_1: This angle shows more white panels and only two black pentagons, emphasizing the even distribution of the pattern.
description_view_2: This side displays a balanced mix of black and white panels, with the seams appearing faint and the surface clean.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals a slightly different arrangement of panels, with the black pentagons more spaced out and the surface still pristine.
